title: conyza membranifolia
intro: Conyza membranifolia, also known as membranous fleabane or membranous conyza, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family that is native to Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Conyza membranifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and tissue repair. Conyza membranifolia is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a cream or ointment.
